ob_welcome_body: A self-hosted baby monitor that keeps your family's data private. No cloud, no subscriptions.
ob_feat_browser: Works on any device with a browser
ob_skip: I already have a room — skip setup
ob_create_body: A room connects baby and parent devices. Give it a name you'll recognize.
ob_connect_body: Open this link on your second device, or scan the QR code.
ob_hint: One device is the baby (near the crib), the other is the parent (with you).
home_tagline: Your data never leaves your home. No subscriptions, ever.
home_join_hint: Paste the link you received, or enter the 32-character room ID.
pwa_banner: Install BabyLink as an app for the best experience
js_remove_confirm:
Remove {label} from this device?

The room itself keeps running for anyone with the link.
js_roomid_invalid: Room IDs are 32 hex characters (the part after the last "/" in a shared link).
pin_protected_body: Enter the room PIN to continue.
role_baby_desc: Place this device near the baby to stream audio
role_parent_desc: Listen and monitor your babies from this device
pin_set_desc: Optionally protect this room with a 4-6 digit PIN.
push_intro: Get alerts on your phone via ntfy when baby cries or a device disconnects.
push_setup:
Setup: Install the ntfy app on your phone (Android / iOS), then subscribe to the topic name you enter below.
Privacy note: Topics on ntfy.sh are public — anyone who knows your topic name can read your alerts. For privacy, run a self-hosted ntfy server and enter its URL in the Server field.
ble_desc: Manage physical baby monitor hardware in this room.
ble_none: No ESP32 devices connected to this room.
ble_add_bt_help: Android Chrome only — discovers nearby BabyLink devices
ble_gate_hint: 🔒 This device is already set up. To change it, tap the button on the device once (its LED blinks 3×), then continue. This stops anyone nearby from re-configuring your monitor.
ble_wifi_desc: Networks this device should roam between. The strongest known one at boot wins.
ble_server_desc: Where this device sends its audio. The active server (radio) is the one it tries first.
ble_devname_desc: A short label so you can tell devices apart on the parent screen.
ble_manual_2: Connect to its setup WiFi network (BabyLinkS3-Setup)
ble_manual_4: Enter your WiFi credentials and the values below:
mon_home_aria: Leave room and go to the home screen
